name: Clarkson Washable Tufted And Hooked Rug - Threshold™
description:
This Clarkson Washable Tufted And Hooked Rug from Threshold™ is a great way to keep your floors protected from scuff marks and scratches while adding easy style to any space. You can use this machine-washable rug in your entryway to keep your family from tracking in dirt, or place several in the kitchen and bathroom to cover up cold tiles. Made with a soft, tufted fabric with skid-resistant latex backing, this diamond-etched rug is as versatile as it is good-looking.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
